header.location: Portland, OR (Open to Remote or Relocation)

summary:
I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Program Manager who thrives on translating strategy into deliverable programs, streamlining operations through data analysis, and coordinating across functions for sustainable impact.
Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve people experience—through human-centered, data-driven approaches.

bullets.text: Consult with {cross|executive leadership} to redesign {coord|accountability structures} and clarify {cross|cross-functional roles} in support of a 2-year {prog|strategic plan}
bullets.original: (new bullet — added for Slalom Program Manager, People Services)
bullets.reason: JD: 'Executive presence, influence senior stakeholders' + 'Strategy-to-Execution Program Management' + 'Stakeholder & Dependency Management' — exec consulting on a 2-year strategic plan hits all three

bullets.text: Upskill HR team in {data|data analysis} to audit 300+ leave cases, successfully refuting cost assumptions via {data|evidence-based insights}
Empower HR to present {data|executive-ready insights} on $362K in leave costs, leading to {ex|policy redesigns} and first aid training
Manage {prog|end-to-end lifecycles} for 20+ {prog|programs} and 10+ vendors, refining {coord|delivery strategy} and {ex|adoption} via {data|feedback analysis}
bullets.original: Manage 20+ programs and 10+ vendors, refining program positioning, delivery strategy, and operations via feedback analysis
bullets.reason: JD: 'Strategy-to-Execution Program Management' is the #1 JD theme — leading with end-to-end program lifecycle ownership

bullets.text: Establish {cross|cross-functional processes} and {coord|documentation} for 70+ staff, {coord|streamlining operations} and reducing onboarding time by 75%
bullets.original: Develop guides and workflows for 70+ cross-functional staff, improving program knowledge and reducing onboarding time by 75%
bullets.reason: JD: process harmonization, SOPs/playbooks, ServiceNow onboarding — direct match to documented workflows for 70+ staff

bullets.text: Conduct interviews to surface needs and gaps from 25+ global stakeholders, resulting in 3 new programs aligned with strategic objectives
bullets.original: Conduct needs assessments with 25+ global stakeholders to identify learning gaps and design 3 new educational programs
bullets.reason: JD: 'Surface cross-regional inefficiencies, risks, and gaps through program analysis' — listening sessions language mirrors JD

bullets.text: Facilitate training webinars for 600+ participants, driving {ex|change adoption} and a 78% {prog|program enrollment rate}
bullets.original: Facilitate training webinars for 600+ participants, enhancing program understanding and driving a 78% client conversion rate
bullets.reason: JD: 'Coordinate communications, training, and knowledge updates' under Change Management — reframed as change adoption

bullets.text: Analyzed 2,000+ employee responses, reporting {data|insights} and recommending actions to the C-suite for {ex|employee engagement}
Managed {tools|SharePoint dashboards} for {data|people metrics}, Net Promoter Score, and survey insights to drive employee recognition
bullets.reason: JD: 'Maintain dashboards and program health reporting' — direct match to dashboards experience

bullets.text: Led a manager effectiveness initiative, translating {data|feedback data} into actionable reports that informed {ex|engagement strategies}
Elevated {ex|employee experience} via {cross|cross-functional projects} focusing on engagement, rewards & recognition, survey development, and L&D
Streamlined {coord|onboarding processes} across 3 global locations by conducting {data|gap analyses} and clarifying job responsibilities
bullets.original: Optimized onboarding processes across 3 global locations by conducting process analysis and clarifying job responsibilities
bullets.reason: JD: process improvement + ServiceNow onboarding/offboarding (top JD example program area) — leads Vestas with strongest two-JD-theme hit

bullets.text: Facilitated {ex|change management} through a Mergers & Acquisitions project, overseeing and aligning {cross|cross-functional stakeholders}
bullets.original: Facilitated smooth organizational change by directing a Mergers & Acquisitions project, overseeing cross-functional stakeholders
bullets.reason: JD: 'Change Management & Enablement' — direct 'change management' verb + 'aligning' shows stakeholder dependency mgmt

bullets.text: Supported HRBP team by piloting an Inclusive Leadership workshop for senior leaders, later scaled to 23 {prog|global locations}
bullets.original: Initiated a DEI pilot with an Inclusive Leadership workshop for 12 senior leaders, later expanded to 23 other global locations
bullets.reason: JD: 'Change Management & Enablement supporting global or multi-region rollouts' — 'scaled to 23 global locations' mirrors multi-region rollout language

bullets.text: Delivered {prog|strategic HR solutions} for business priorities across projects in employee relations, headcount, and succession planning
bullets.original: Strengthened engagement via an HR newsletter and award-winning well-being initiatives, recognized among 1,000+ competitors
bullets.reason: JD: 'Coordinate across COEs, PBPs, IT, Legal' — ER/headcount/succession is exactly the COE coordination Slalom expects in People Services

bullets.text: Developed proficiency across various HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management
Filled a challenging international role by drafting job descriptions, posting openings, and researching global compensation details
Engaged global talent via personalized communication and customer service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants

bullets: Relevant Coursework: Organizational Psychology, Research Methods, Group Dynamics & Leadership, Consumer Psychology

projects: Consulting Projects: Enhanced Elanco Animal Health employer branding & talent attraction strategy via survey design/execution
Master's Capstone: Examined non-monetary factors shaping employer attractiveness for YouTube via mixed-methods research
Scholarships: Freeman Asian Scholarship (4-year full-tuition), Tuck Bridge Scholarship (full)

Certifications: HRCI Human Resource Associate Certificate (in progress)

Qualifications: 5+ years program/project management experience including cross-functional delivery; HR/People Ops/Shared Services experience; strong written/verbal communication; data-driven approach.
